prompt:
STYLE: editorial-cool premium product hero, 1:1 square, 4K. Dynamic orbiting composition. Magazine-ad energy.

BACKDROP: smooth clean PURE WHITE backdrop with a subtle warm-gray paper texture. A faint atmospheric haze adds depth.

HERO COMPOSITION — a photorealistic rendering of the Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (matching the provided reference) centered in the frame as the gravitational anchor. ORBITING the jar in a dynamic semi-circular arc are three PHOTOREALISTIC 3D-RENDERED INGREDIENTS, suspended in mid-air at different distances and angles (as if frozen mid-orbit around the jar):
  • A bundle of fresh red-purple sea moss fronds suspended upper-left, slight motion blur
  • A sliced burdock root suspended upper-right with the cut face catching light
  • A small cluster of yellow dandelion flowers suspended at the lower-right
Three dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES are also suspended near the jar, frozen in motion. The whole composition feels DYNAMIC — like a freeze-frame of ingredients being poured into the jar. Subtle motion-blur streaks on the suspended objects.

LIGHTING: bright clean studio light from upper-left + a soft warm gold rim-light from the right. The jar has a sharp clean specular gleam down its curved side. Each suspended object has its own clean rim-light.

MINIMAL TEXT — only ONE bold headline rendered LARGE in deep ink-black typography at the bottom of the frame, centered:
   'THREE BOTANICALS.'
Nothing else. NO sub-headline, NO labels on the ingredients, NO feature pills, NO icons.

DESIGN: editorial dynamic freeze-frame composition · jar grounded center, ingredients orbiting · bold black headline · NO graphic-design noise · clean editorial product-page energy.

RULES: all text cleanly spelled · 1:1 4K · pure white backdrop · no border/frame · text limited to single headline only · ingredients are photoreal 3D renders.
